name: medgram
description: Plataforma de marketing médico para Instagram con gate de aprobación del doctor

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,dashboard -c blue,magenta "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:dashboard"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @medgram/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @medgram/content-pipeline
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @medgram/api && npm run build --workspace @medgram/dashboard
